message:
fix(extensions): serialize superinstruction tests to prevent parallel race

Tests using the global hostcall superinstruction state were intermittently
failing when run in parallel because concurrent tests interleaved trace
history writes. Add a test-only serialization mutex guard that ensures
only one superinstruction-dependent test runs at a time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
